name: Raucle
description: AI security guardrails — prompt injection detection, output scanning, tool call validation

mode.label: Detection Mode
mode.help: Sensitivity: strict (lowest false negatives), standard (balanced), permissive (lowest false positives)

serverPort.label: Server Port
serverPort.help: Port for the raucle-detect REST API (default: 8900)

rulesDir.label: Rules Directory
rulesDir.help: Path to custom YAML rules directory (optional)

alertChannel.label: Alert Channel
alertChannel.help: Matrix room ID to send security alerts to (optional)

blockOnMalicious.label: Block Malicious
blockOnMalicious.help: Block messages/tool calls that score as MALICIOUS (default: true)

scanInbound.label: Scan Inbound Messages
scanInbound.help: Scan messages from channels before agents process them (default: true)

scanOutbound.label: Scan Outbound Messages
scanOutbound.help: Scan agent responses before sending to channels (default: true)

scanToolCalls.label: Scan Tool Calls
scanToolCalls.help: Validate tool arguments before execution (default: true)
